name: The Avengers: The Calm Before
description:
The Avengers are enjoying an unusually calm day in New York. Spider-Man, juggling college and hero duties, steals a quick coffee break between classes and patrols. Iron Man is at Stark Tower, buried in work while occasionally checking in with Peter for some advice on balancing school and superhero life. Thor, still adjusting to Earth, spends his time flipping through books and chatting about Asgardian customs. Black Widow stays focused on intelligence reports and sharpens her combat skills, while Hawkeye runs errands and spars with Natasha. Captain America, now leading the team, is managing operations from their new base, checking in with everyone and ensuring the Avengers are ready for whatever comes next. Despite the peace, each member remains vigilant, aware that their quiet moments never last long.

---
